markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 201. Gen. Provisions & Admin.
##### § 201.204 — Sunset Provision

The Texas Department of Transportation is subject to Chapter 325 (Sunset Law) , Government Code (Texas Sunset Act). Unless continued in existence as provided by that chapter, the department is abolished September 1, 2029.

*Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 533 (S.B.312), Sec. 3, eff. September 1, 2017.*
